why_lost: Stopped after 12 bars — trade had time but ultimately failed. Could be a structural breakdown, not a timing issue.
Stop was 24 ticks (6.00 pts) — wide. Wide stops increase risk per trade; if winning, check if TP2 also hits.
Entry was 125m into the ny_open window. Late-kill-zone entries tend to chase extended moves. Consider filtering entries > 75m into any kill zone.
